type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
The quantity of metals in the WWTP biosolids is dependent upon the highly variable nature of the City wastewaters.  Citizens and businesses within the City are relied upon to adhere to the Sanitary Sewer use bylaw when discharging metals.
